semantics.shortPressureProxyScore: Higher means higher FINRA reported short-sale volume ratio; interpretation is two-sided.
semantics.offExchangeActivityProxyScore: Higher means higher FINRA reported off-exchange activity share versus local consolidated volume; not true ATS-only dark-pool flow.
